overall.description: High-quality game engine footage from a driving simulator showing first-person perspective inside a luxury SUV with red interior. The player navigates through a hazy, dense urban commercial district filled with billboards and neon signage, then transitions onto an elevated highway system. The visual style features ray-traced lighting and photorealistic textures characteristic of modern AAA games.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a multi-lane urban arterial road with palm trees lining the median. The driver approaches a traffic light, stops, then proceeds through the intersection. The environment transitions from sparse commercial buildings to a denser urban core with large billboards becoming visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense commercial corridor filled with towering digital billboards and neon signs, including a prominent 'Night City' archway. The driver overtakes a red sports car while navigating moderate traffic, then begins merging toward a highway entrance as concrete overpass structures dominate the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with concrete barriers and distant skyline views

events.description: entering elevated highway from city streets, gaining altitude

overhead highway direction signs mounted on metal gantries

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions onto an elevated highway, leaving the dense commercial district behind. Concrete guardrails line the sides of the raised roadway as the driver accelerates to cruising speed. The view opens up to show distant cityscape and mountains under the hazy sky, with minimal traffic on the multi-lane highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a palm-lined urban arterial road into a dense commercial district before ascending onto an open elevated highway. It begins by proceeding through a traffic intersection where sparse commercial buildings gradually give way to a denser urban core with large billboards appearing in the distance. As the vehicle enters a crowded commercial corridor, the view becomes dominated by towering digital signs and a prominent Night City archway, with the driver overtaking a red sports car amidst moderate traffic. The scene then shifts as the car merges toward a highway entrance, moving under heavy concrete overpass structures that lead the vehicle onto a raised roadway. Finally, the environment opens up as the driver accelerates past concrete guardrails, leaving the neon district behind for a wide view of a distant cityscape and mountains under a hazy sky.
